query:
insert into DirectReqTraces (
                    last_collect_nr,
                    req_id,
                    file_hash,
                    line
                )
                values (
                    $1,
                    $2,
                    $3,
                    $4
                )
                on conflict (req_id, file_hash, line)
                do update set
                    last_collect_nr = excluded.last_collect_nr
